parameters.jsonBody:
{"model": "gpt-4o", "temperature": 0.3, "max_tokens": 2000, "response_format": {"type": "json_object"}, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are extracting structured operational data from a real estate agent onboarding interview.

RULES:
- Only extract facts explicitly stated by the AGENT (not the interviewer).
- If a field is not clearly stated, return null — do not guess.
- Confidence scale 1–10: only return fields with confidence >= 7.
- Hard facts (email, phone, zip) have been pre-extracted by regex — use those as ground truth if present.

Return ONLY valid JSON matching this exact schema. No commentary."}, {"role": "user", "content": "='HARD FACTS (regex-extracted, high confidence):\n' + JSON.stringify($('Stage 1 — Pre-processor').first().json.meta.hard_facts, null, 2) + '\n\nANCHOR (caller-supplied hint — trust transcript over anchor if conflict):\n' + JSON.stringify($('Stage 1 — Pre-processor').first().json.meta.anchor, null, 2) + '\n\nAGENT TRANSCRIPT SEGMENTS:\n' + $('Stage 1 — Pre-processor').first().json.segments.operational + '\n\nExtract the following fields. Return null for any field not clearly stated.\n\n{\n  \"agent_full_name\": string | null,\n  \"agent_first_name\": string | null,\n  \"agent_last_name\": string | null,\n  \"agent_title\": string | null,\n  \"business_name\": string | null,\n  \"agent_email\": string | null,\n  \"agent_phone\": string | null,\n  \"company_website\": string | null,\n  \"funnel_url\": string | null,\n  \"office_address\": { \"street\": string | null, \"city\": string | null, \"state\": string | null, \"zip\": string | null },\n  \"market_area\": string | null,\n  \"market_name\": string | null,\n  \"timezone\": string | null,\n  \"specialties_keywords\": [string],\n  \"preferred_area_codes\": [string],\n  \"coverage_cities\": [string],\n  \"ai_coordinator_name\": string | null,\n  \"agent_notes\": string | null,\n  \"years_in_real_estate\": number | null,\n  \"license_year\": number | null,\n  \"confidence_notes\": string\n}'"}]}

{"model": "gpt-4o", "temperature": 0.3, "max_tokens": 2000, "response_format": {"type": "json_object"}, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are a skilled biographer writing rich, specific portrait paragraphs about a real estate agent based on their onboarding interview.

YOUR JOB: Write two portrait paragraphs — Background and Areas Served.

RULES:
- Write in third person, present tense for professional facts, past tense for history.
- Use the agent's actual words and phrasing where they are vivid and specific.
- NEVER invent facts. Only use what is in the transcript.
- NEVER use first person (I, my, me).
- Minimum 900 characters per paragraph. Aim for 1,200–1,600.
- Be specific. Generic sentences like "Chris is passionate about real estate" are worthless. Find the story.
- The Background paragraph should feel like the opening of a biography — the reader should understand who this person is and how they got here.
- The Areas Served paragraph should convey not just WHERE but WHY — their connection to the territory, their knowledge of it, what makes them the right person for it.

BEFORE RETURNING: Count characters in each paragraph. If either is under 900 chars, expand it. State the character count in a scratchpad line before the JSON."}, {"role": "user", "content": "='AGENT NAME: ' + ($('Stage 1 — Pre-processor').first().json.meta.anchor.expected_agent_name || 'the agent') + '\n\nRELEVANT TRANSCRIPT SEGMENTS (origin story, geography, personal background):\n' + $('Stage 1 — Pre-processor').first().json.segments.origin_and_geography + '\n\nWrite the following two portrait paragraphs. Return as JSON.\n\n{\n  \"scratchpad\": \"background: [X] chars | areas_served: [Y] chars\",\n  \"background\": \"[Full background paragraph — 900-1600 chars. Career origin, prior life, pivot moment, values, worldview. End with what drives them now.]\",\n  \"areas_served\": \"[Full areas served paragraph — 900-1400 chars. Where they work, why they know it, their connection to the community, what they understand about the territory that others don\'t.]\"
}'"}]}

{"model": "gpt-4o", "temperature": 0.3, "max_tokens": 2000, "response_format": {"type": "json_object"}, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are a skilled biographer writing rich, specific portrait paragraphs about a real estate agent based on their onboarding interview.

YOUR JOB: Write two portrait paragraphs — Specialties and Style.

RULES:
- Write in third person, present tense.
- Use the agent's actual words and phrasing where they are vivid and specific.
- NEVER invent facts. Only use what is in the transcript.
- NEVER use first person (I, my, me).
- Specialties: minimum 1,200 characters. Open with a narrative paragraph about what they do best and who they help most. Follow with 5–8 bulleted strengths drawn from specific stories or statements in the transcript. Close with a sentence on how they work with other agents or professionals.
- Style: minimum 900 characters. Cover: how they communicate, how they handle pressure, what they value in client relationships, their honesty principle, what they refuse to tolerate. Include a boundary statement if present. Use their actual phrasing where it crackles.

BEFORE RETURNING: Count characters in each section. State counts in scratchpad. Expand if under minimums."}, {"role": "user", "content": "='AGENT NAME: ' + ($('Stage 1 — Pre-processor').first().json.meta.anchor.expected_agent_name || 'the agent') + '\n\nRELEVANT TRANSCRIPT SEGMENTS (client types, work method, boundaries, competitive edge):\n' + $('Stage 1 — Pre-processor').first().json.segments.method_and_character + '\n\nWrite the following two portrait sections. Return as JSON.\n\n{\n  \"scratchpad\": \"specialties: [X] chars | style: [Y] chars\",\n  \"specialties\": \"[Full specialties section — 1200+ chars. Narrative paragraph + 5-8 specific bullets + closing sentence.]\",\n  \"style\": \"[Full style paragraph — 900+ chars. Communication approach, pressure handling, client relationship values, boundaries, non-negotiables. Use their actual phrasing.]\"\n}'"}]}

{"model": "gpt-4o", "temperature": 0.3, "max_tokens": 2000, "response_format": {"type": "json_object"}, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are extracting FAQ content and personal details from a real estate agent onboarding interview.

YOUR JOB: Write 8–10 FAQ pairs and a personal interests/lifestyle note.

FAQ RULES:
- Pull from the interviewer's actual questions in the transcript wherever possible.
- Fill gaps with standard onboarding questions (list below).
- Format: "Q: ...\nA: ..." with a blank line between pairs.
- Use the agent's first name in each question.
- Answers: 2–4 sentences in third-person voice, using their actual phrasing where strong.
- Total FAQ section: minimum 1,500 characters. Aim for 2,000–2,500.
- OMIT any question with no transcript material — do not include empty answers.

STANDARD QUESTIONS TO ATTEMPT (use agent's first name):
- How long has [Name] been in real estate?
- What kind of clients does [Name] work with?
- What makes [Name] different?
- Does [Name] work more with buyers or sellers?
- What's [Name]'s communication style?
- How does [Name] handle tough situations or losses?
- What's [Name]'s competitive edge?
- What does the perfect [Name] client look like?
- Where did [Name] start in the business?
- What does [Name] do outside of real estate?

PERSONAL NOTE RULES:
- 2–4 sentences capturing life outside work: family, hobbies, interests, community involvement.
- Only include what was explicitly mentioned. Return null if nothing personal was shared.

BEFORE RETURNING: Count FAQ characters. State count in scratchpad. Expand if under 1,500."}, {"role": "user", "content": "='AGENT NAME: ' + ($('Stage 1 — Pre-processor').first().json.meta.anchor.expected_agent_name || 'the agent') + '\nAGENT FIRST NAME: ' + (($('Stage 1 — Pre-processor').first().json.meta.anchor.expected_agent_name || 'the agent').split(' ')[0]) + '\n\nRELEVANT TRANSCRIPT SEGMENTS (Q&A exchanges, personal background):\n' + $('Stage 1 — Pre-processor').first().json.segments.faq_and_personal + '\n\nReturn as JSON.\n\n{\n  \"scratchpad\": \"faq: [X] chars\",\n  \"faq\": \"[Full FAQ section — 8-10 Q&A pairs, 1500+ chars total]\",\n  \"personal_note\": \"[2-4 sentences about life outside work, or null if nothing mentioned]\"\n}'"}]}

{"model": "gpt-4o", "temperature": 0.5, "max_tokens": 4000, "response_format": {"type": "json_object"}, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are a gifted writer. You have been given five rich biographical sections about a real estate agent, extracted from a personal interview. Your job is to weave them into a single, flowing portrait document.

This document will be sent to the agent as a gift — the first thing they receive after their onboarding interview. It should feel like someone truly listened to them, understood them, and captured who they are.

TONE: Warm, specific, respectful. Not promotional. Not a sales pitch. A portrait.

STRUCTURE — follow this Hero's Journey arc:

1. OPENING (2-3 sentences): A vivid, specific opening that captures the essence of who this person is. Start with something concrete from their story — not a generic intro.

2. THE WORLD BEFORE: Where they came from. Their life before real estate. What they left behind or what led them here. (Draw from background section)

3. THE CALL: The moment or reason they got into real estate. The pivot. The decision. (Draw from background section)

4. THE TERRITORY: Where they work and why. Their connection to the land and community. What they know that others don't. (Draw from areas_served section)

5. THE METHOD: How they operate. Who they serve. What they're known for. Their edge. (Draw from specialties section)

6. THE CODE: How they communicate. What they protect. What they won't tolerate. Their values in action. (Draw from style section)

7. CLOSING (2-3 sentences): A forward-looking close that captures where they're headed and what they stand for.

RULES:
- Third person throughout. Never "I" or "my."
- Use the agent's actual phrasing where it's vivid and specific. Quote sparingly but powerfully.
- No bullet points in the portrait — flowing prose only.
- Minimum 2,500 characters. Aim for 3,000–4,000.
- Do NOT include section headers like "THE WORLD BEFORE" — the sections should flow naturally.
- This is not a resume. It is a portrait."}, {"role": "user", "content": "='AGENT NAME: ' + ($('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.agent_full_name || 'the agent') + '\nAGENT FIRST NAME: ' + ($('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.agent_first_name || 'the agent') + '\nMARKET: ' + ($('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.market_name || $('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.market_area || 'their market') + '\n\nBACKGROUND SECTION:\n' + $('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.bio.background + '\n\nAREAS SERVED SECTION:\n' + $('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.bio.areas_served + '\n\nSPECIALTIES SECTION:\n' + $('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.bio.specialties + '\n\nSTYLE SECTION:\n' + $('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.bio.style + '\n\nFAQ SECTION (use for additional color and specific details):\n' + $('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.bio.faq + '\n\nWrite the portrait document. Return as JSON:\n{\n  \"agent_portrait\": \"[Full flowing portrait — 2500-4000 chars, Hero\'s Journey arc, no section headers, no bullet points]\"\n}'"}]}

{"model": "gpt-4o", "temperature": 0.5, "max_tokens": 4000, "response_format": {"type": "json_object"}, "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are building a behavioral brief for an AI agent named Jon. Jon will represent a real estate agent in text conversations with their leads.

You have been given biographical sections extracted from the agent's onboarding interview. Your job is to translate that material into a precise behavioral brief that tells Jon:
- How this agent communicates (their actual style, cadence, vocabulary)
- Who their ideal clients are and how to identify them
- What Jon should emphasize about this agent's value
- What Jon should NEVER say or do on their behalf
- How to handle pressure, objections, and difficult moments
- What this agent's non-negotiables are

TONE: Direct, instructional. Written for an AI to follow, not for a human to read.

STRUCTURE:

## VOICE & TONE
How this agent actually communicates. Their cadence, their humor (or lack of it), their vocabulary. Specific phrases they use. What they sound like.

## IDEAL CLIENT PROFILE
Who this agent works best with. Who to qualify in. Who to qualify out. Red flags.

## VALUE PROPOSITION
What makes this agent different. What to emphasize when leads ask "why should I work with you?" Use their actual differentiators, not generic claims.

## NON-NEGOTIABLES
What this agent will not tolerate. Situations where Jon should set a boundary or escalate to the agent. Things Jon must never promise or commit to on their behalf.

## PRESSURE & OBJECTION HANDLING
How this agent handles tough moments. Their philosophy on losses, difficult clients, and hard conversations. How Jon should respond when leads push back.

## THINGS TO NEVER SAY
Specific phrases, claims, or commitments that are off-limits. Based on what the agent said about their values and approach.

RULES:
- Minimum 1,500 characters total.
- Be specific. Generic instructions like "be professional" are useless.
- Ground every instruction in something the agent actually said or demonstrated in the interview.
- Write in second person to Jon: "When a lead asks X, respond by...""}, {"role": "user", "content": "='AGENT NAME: ' + ($('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.agent_full_name || 'the agent') + '\nAGENT FIRST NAME: ' + ($('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.agent_first_name || 'the agent') + '\n\nBACKGROUND:\n' + $('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.bio.background + '\n\nSPECIALTIES:\n' + $('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.bio.specialties + '\n\nSTYLE:\n' + $('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.bio.style + '\n\nAREAS SERVED:\n' + $('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.bio.areas_served + '\n\nFAQ (additional behavioral signals):\n' + $('Stage 3 — Merge & Floor Check').first().json.bio.faq + '\n\nBuild the behavioral brief for Jon. Return as JSON:\n{\n  \"agent_characteristics\": \"[Full behavioral brief — 1500+ chars, structured with ## headers as specified]\",\n  \"personality_prompt\": \"[The full agent_personality.prompt — 1500-4500 chars. Template header + ## Core Principles + ## Agent Specifics bullets.]\"\n}'"}]}
